title: Cloud-Native Architectures Workshop
description: Learn to design and deploy scalable cloud-native applications using microservices, Kubernetes, and modern DevOps practices.

title: Apex Global Hackathon 2024
description: A 48-hour global hackathon where developers build cutting-edge AI solutions, compete, and collaborate with top innovators.

title: Cybernetic Interfaces Meetup
description: Explore the future of human-machine interaction, VR workspaces, and neural interfaces with industry leaders.

title: Open Source Sprint: React Ecosystem
description: Collaborate with maintainers and contribute to major React libraries while learning advanced open-source workflows.

title: AI Ethics & Governance Panel
description: A panel discussion on ethical AI, responsible development, and global governance frameworks shaping the future.
